businessInfo.title: Business Information
businessInfo.disclaimer: HiddenPro is a service intermediary platform and is not a party to any e-commerce transactions. Therefore, HiddenPro bears no responsibility for the content, terms, or quality of services registered by professionals. All responsibilities regarding service provision and transactions lie solely with the professionals and clients involved.

landing.whyDesc:
We cut the commission fees and deepened the trust.
Experience the fastest and safest O2O platform chosen by 1M users.
landing.feature1Desc: All professionals have passed ID and contact verification. We've completely eliminated the anxiety of letting a stranger into your home.
landing.feature2Desc: HiddenPro charges absolutely zero commission. Trade directly and transparently through 1:1 chat between customer and pro.
landing.feature3Desc: No more spam calls and messages. Compare only the top 5 verified pro quotes to save your precious time and money.
landing.proBannerDesc:
Find nearby jobs quickly and easily,
and send quotes to the customers you want at a reasonable cost.

referral.listEmpty: No referrals yet. Start inviting friends!
referral.redeemOwn: You cannot redeem your own coupon.
referral.howProToPro: Pro invites Pro — Both earn 150 Bonus Credits when the new pro sends their first quote.
referral.howCustToPro: Customer invites Pro — Customer gets a discount coupon, new pro earns 150 Bonus Credits.
referral.howCustToCust: Customer invites Customer — Both get a discount coupon when the new customer requests their first quote.
referral.howProToCust: Pro invites Customer — Pro earns 150 Bonus Credits, new customer gets a discount coupon.
referral.inviteBannerCust: Invite friends & get a discount coupon!
referral.loginRequired: Please log in to use the referral program.
referral.legalExpiry: Bonus Credits and Discount Coupons expire based on the platform's current policy (default: 3 years from issuance). The expiry period is set by the administrator and applies to rewards issued after each policy change.
referral.legalNoCash: Rewards have no cash value and cannot be exchanged for cash, refunded, or transferred to another account under any circumstances.
referral.legalTrigger: Rewards are credited only after the invited user submits their first quote (Pro) or posts their first request (Customer). Simply signing up does not qualify.
referral.legalCouponUsage: Each Discount Coupon can only be used once per service match. The customer shares the coupon code with the matched pro, and the pro redeems it in the app. The system converts the coupon value into Bonus Credits for the pro — no cash changes hands between customer and pro.
referral.legalAntiFraud: HiddenPro reserves the right to revoke rewards and permanently suspend accounts if any fraudulent activity, self-referral, or system abuse is detected, without prior notice.
referral.legalPermit: Per DTI Fair Trade Permit No. FTEB-XXXXX Series of 2026
referral.couponGuideTitle: How to Use Your Discount Coupon
referral.couponStep1: After you are matched with a pro, share your coupon code with them via chat.
referral.couponStep2: The pro enters your coupon code in their app (Invite → Redeem Customer Coupon).
referral.couponStep3: The system verifies the coupon and instantly converts the discount amount into Bonus Credits for the pro.
referral.couponStep4: The pro applies the discount to your service fee. You pay the reduced amount directly to the pro.
referral.couponNote1: Each coupon can only be used once per service match.
referral.couponNote2: The coupon must be redeemed before the service is completed.
referral.couponNote3: No cash refund is given for unused coupons — they expire based on the platform's policy.
referral.bannerIncluded: Your referral code is already included in all banners.
referral.copiedEmbed: Banner embed code copied! Paste it into your blog or website.
